activities_projects.title: Harvest Festival Discussion
activities_projects.objective: Understand the cultural significance of harvest festivals
steps: Discuss harvest festivals celebrated in your region
Explain when the festival is celebrated
Describe how people celebrate it
Share your ideas with classmates
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand cultural traditions related to harvest
activities_projects.evaluation: Participation and clarity of explanation (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Understanding Hymns
activities_projects.objective: Learn the meaning and purpose of hymns
steps: Read the definition of a hymn
Discuss to whom hymns are offered
Identify where and when hymns are sung
Write reasons why people sing hymns
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand the purpose of hymns in praising divine powers
activities_projects.evaluation: Accuracy of responses and discussion (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Archaic Words Matching Activity
activities_projects.objective: Learn the meanings of archaic words used in poetry
steps: Read the archaic words such as thou, thee, thy, thine
Match them with their correct meanings
Write the answers in your notebook
Discuss the modern equivalents with classmates
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students recognise and understand old English words

activities_projects.title: Vocabulary Meaning Exercise
steps: Read the paragraph about a respected elder
Identify the meanings of words such as radiance, tribute, cherished, counsel, and munificent
Select the correct options
Write the answers in your notebook
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students learn contextual meanings of new vocabulary

activities_projects.title: Poem Recitation Activity
steps: Read the poem 'Harvest Hymn' aloud
Practice correct pronunciation and rhythm
Recite the poem in front of the class
Focus on expression and clarity
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students improve oral reading and appreciation of poetry

activities_projects.title: Main Idea Identification
activities_projects.objective: Understand the message of each stanza
steps: Read each stanza of the poem carefully
Identify the main idea of each stanza
Match the ideas with the correct stanza numbers
Discuss answers with classmates
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand the thematic meaning of the poem
activities_projects.evaluation: Correct identification of stanza ideas (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Poetic Devices Identification
activities_projects.objective: Recognise literary devices used in poetry
steps: Read selected lines from the poem
Identify poetic devices such as imagery, metaphor, personification, and alliteration
Write examples in your notebook
Discuss how these devices enhance the poem
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand the use of poetic devices in literature

activities_projects.title: Symbolism Activity
activities_projects.objective: Understand symbolic meanings in the poem
steps: Read the symbols such as Surya, Varuna, and Prithvi
Match each symbol with its meaning
Explain why these symbols are important in the poem
Share your answers with the class
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students learn symbolic representation in poetry

activities_projects.title: Farming Tools Identification
activities_projects.objective: Learn about farming implements mentioned in the lesson
steps: Observe the pictures of farming tools
Match each tool with its correct use
Complete the names of the implements
Write the answers in your notebook
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students gain awareness of agricultural tools

activities_projects.title: Short Answer Reflection
activities_projects.objective: Develop critical thinking and comprehension skills
steps: Read the comprehension questions about the poem
Write answers in your notebook
Explain why farmers praise the gods of rain and sun
Discuss how the poem shows gratitude towards nature
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand the deeper message of gratitude towards nature and divine forces
activities_projects.evaluation: Clarity of ideas and accuracy of answers (10 marks)
